  1. ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model

Uses of Package
ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model

Packages that use ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model
Package
Description
ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler
 
ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model
 
ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.steps.checkers
 
ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.steps.io.sinks

ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.steps.transformations
 
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler
    Class
    Description
    ChainBuilder
    Fluent builder that accumulates Transformations into a compilation chain.
    Transformation
    A single step in a compilation chain: a function I → O.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model
    Class
    Description
    ChainBuilder
    Fluent builder that accumulates Transformations into a compilation chain.
    ChainCompiler
    A fully assembled compilation pipeline: Source → Transformation chain → Sink.
    Checker
    An idempotent pipeline step: inspects the value without modifying it.
    Checker.Check
    Functional interface for the Transformation.of(Transformation.Step) factory.
    CompilationContext
    Mutable context threaded through every step of a compilation pipeline.
    Diagnostic
    A single diagnostic message produced during compilation.
    Diagnostic.Level
     
    Sink
    Last step of a compilation chain: serialises the pipeline output to a file.
    Source
    First step of a compilation chain: reads an input file and produces the initial value fed to the first Transformation.
    Source.Provider
    Functional interface for the Source.of(Source.Provider) factory.
    Transformation
    A single step in a compilation chain: a function I → O.
    Transformation.Step
    Functional interface for the Transformation.of(Transformation.Step) factory — allows steps to be expressed as lambdas or method references.
  • Classes in ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.model used by ca.mcscert.jpipe.compiler.steps.checkers
    Class
    Description
    Checker
    An idempotent pipeline step: inspects the value without modifying it.

    Transformation

    First step of a compilation chain: reads an input file and produces the initial value fed to the first Transformation.
